reason: Verify exec dialect remains compute-free and dispatch/fallback focused.
Verify decisions remain capability-driven and target-neutral.
Verify scalar fallback remains plugin-local, gated, and metadata-only.
Verify plugin protocol and built-in registry contracts are preserved.
Verify selection/dispatch/fallback behavior matches the variant pipeline.
Verify non-executable emission diagnostics are unambiguous.
Verify tests and local evidence match project expectations.
